description_long: This is a large, industrial-style filing cabinet with a rugged black exterior and reinforced metal corners. The front features two large mesh doors flanking a central open shelving section, with a control panel or display at the bottom center. The sides are adorned with various stickers and posters, giving it a well-used, urban appearance. The back is plain and solid, lacking any visible openings or features. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with some plastic or rubber elements at the corners and feet. Its robust build and decorative stickers suggest it might be used in a garage, workshop, or music venue.
description: A large, black industrial filing cabinet with mesh doors, open shelving, and urban stickers on the sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows two large mesh doors, a central open shelving section, and a control panel at the bottom.
description_view_1: The left side view displays several urban-themed stickers and posters attached to the solid black surface.
description_view_2: The back view is plain, solid black, and lacks any visible features or openings.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with the same arrangement of stickers and posters.
